goal: 记录 cxs 多源工作流 worker pending 状态

summary.title: 记录多源工作流 worker pending 状态
summary.what: Updated the workflow registry and live state after requesting A1, A2, and A3 worker sessions. The Codex App launcher returned pending worktree ids, so the control plane records those ids and the next reconciliation step instead of pretending concrete thread ids already exist.
summary.why: The orchestrator registry must reflect actual launch state. Capturing pending ids makes the workflow recoverable while worktree-backed sessions finish creation.
summary.user_goal: 记录 cxs 多源工作流 worker pending 状态

decisions.chose: Record pending worktree ids in session-registry.md until actual thread ids are available.
decisions.rationale: The launcher returned pendingWorktreeId values, not thread ids, and the registry should not invent or guess ids.

decisions.chose: Move workflow-state from Wave 0 setup to Wave 1 launch in progress.
decisions.rationale: The control plane is sealed and the first three read-only worker sessions have been requested.

rejected.alternative: Leave registry entries as TBD after launch requests.
rejected.reason: That would create registry drift and make recovery harder if the orchestrator context compacts.

review_notes: Docs-only state update; no runtime, CLI, DB, source, or skill behavior changed.
Verification performed: git diff --check passed before commit; Mainline preflight allowed the update.
The first create_thread attempt used a manual worktree path as projectId and failed; no thread was created. Subsequent requests used the saved project id and returned pending ids.

architectural_claims: Worker launch state must be represented using actual thread ids or pending launcher ids, not planned placeholders.
